_metadata.description: Controlled vocabulary for the 7 severity tiers used across interaction rules, harmful-additive flags, allergen warnings, and the clinical-risk taxonomy. Carries the full DISPLAY CONTRACT (name + short_label + tone + ui_color + ui_icon + action + notes) per the cross-cutting rule in REFERENCE_DATA_LOOKUP_OPPORTUNITIES.md — Flutter is a renderer, not a decision-maker for tone/color/icon. This is the most-repeated descriptive token in the blob ecosystem; centralizing it pays for itself many times over.
_metadata.status: LOCKED — clinician + design alignment 2026-05-02 (added no_data tier per integrity-gate audit)
_metadata.purpose: Display contract for the 6 canonical severities emitted by enrich_supplements_v3 / interaction-rules engine and consumed by Flutter alert widgets. Each entry carries the locked name/short_label/tone/ui_color/ui_icon/action — Flutter renders verbatim.
_metadata.alignment: Pipeline source: scripts/data/ingredient_interaction_rules.json (`severity` field), scripts/data/clinical_risk_taxonomy.json (`severity_levels` taxonomy id field). Flutter consumer: lib/core/constants/severity.dart (replaces enum-embedded labels).

field_contract.id: Stable snake_case identifier emitted by the pipeline (lowercase). Source data field: `severity` on interaction rules; `id` on clinical_risk_taxonomy.severity_levels.
field_contract.name: Full user-facing label (sentence case). Shown in detail screens.
field_contract.short_label: Compact chip / pill label (≤12 chars). Shown in dense list views.
field_contract.tone: Semantic intent. One of: positive, neutral, info, warning, danger.
field_contract.ui_color: Color hint. One of: green, blue, gray, yellow, orange, red.
field_contract.ui_icon: Icon hint. One of: check, info, warning, alert, block.
field_contract.notes: ≤200-char plain-English description shown in tap-to-learn modal.

_metadata.prerequisite_completed: info → informational rename landed 2026-04-30 across ingredient_interaction_rules*.json (20 occurrences) + clinical_risk_taxonomy.json (1 id) + dosage_normalizer.py + build_final_db.py.

severities.name: Do not use
severities.notes: Use is contraindicated — the combination is unsafe and there is no acceptable monitoring path. Stop the product and contact your provider.

severities.name: Not recommended
severities.notes: Risk outweighs benefit for most people. Avoid this product and consider an alternative or talk to your provider before using.

severities.name: Use caution
severities.notes: Possible interaction or sensitivity. Use only with healthcare provider awareness. Watch for the symptoms described in the warning.

severities.name: Monitor
severities.notes: Use is generally acceptable but track for the effects described. Report changes to your provider at your next visit.

severities.name: Informational
severities.notes: Context-only — no profile-specific risk detected. Shown so you understand the underlying biology before adding to a stack.

severities.name: Safe
severities.notes: No interaction or sensitivity flagged. Use as directed on the label.

severities.name: Insufficient data
severities.notes: Pregnancy, lactation, or interaction evidence is unavailable for this combination. Treat with caution and consult your provider.
